ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was issued */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the publication */,
  "topic_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of topic IDs the publication is related to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication type (e.g., Memo, Letters and Comments) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity involved in the publication */,
  "comment_due_date" TEXT /* Date when comments are due for the publication */,
  "final_rule_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the final rule will go into effect, if applicable */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the publication */,
  "draft_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the publication is a draft or final */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication (e.g., published, under review, withdrawn) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the publication was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the publication */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the publication */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* URL where the publication can be accessed online */,
  "number_of_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the document file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES publication_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic, if any */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication type (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Government Agency, Educational Institution) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the entity */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the entity */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the entity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the entity (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_topics" (
  "pt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-topic relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_topics_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., government official, educational administrator, researcher) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "replied_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who replied to the comment */,
  "replied_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_replied_by FOREIGN KEY ("replied_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the attachment is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure integrity */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_type" TEXT /* Type of the stakeholder (e.g., Government Agency, Educational Institution, Research Organization) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stakeholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the stakeholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the stakeholder */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the stakeholder */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stakeholder (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_stakeholders" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-stakeholder relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_stakeholders_stakeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_stakeholders_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
